description.name: Crypto Payment Gateway (Multicoin / Multi Mode)
description.tagline: Accept any supported coin via hosted checkout — No KYC, instant payouts
description.long: A single payment method that accepts any supported cryptocurrency through PayGate's hosted checkout, with optional custom domain and branding. Set one payout wallet per chain family.
features: One method accepts every supported coin
Hosted checkout with custom domain and branding
ZERO KYC for both merchant and customer
